hero.headline: One clinic for every age under your roof.
hero.subtext: The same three doctors, so your file and your history stay in one place for decades, not one visit.

items.title: Little ones
items.desc: Gentle, unhurried visits with a separate well-baby waiting corner so newborns never share a bench with flu season.

items.title: Growing up
items.desc: School-age checkups that respect a teenager's privacy and a parent's questions, in the right order.

items.title: The busy years
items.desc: Working-age care built around your calendar, with evening slots and reports on your phone by the next morning.

items.title: Elder care
items.desc: Longer appointment slots, a ground-floor consulting room, and one doctor who reads the whole medicine list together.

about.body: CarePoint Clinic is a local business built on quality work and word-of-mouth. We keep it simple: show up on time, do it properly, charge fairly. Most of our customers come back — and bring their friends.

items.name: R. Sharma
items.quote: Professional from start to finish. Exactly what was promised, when it was promised.

items.name: A. Fernandes
items.quote: Fair price, quality work. Already recommended them twice.

items.q: How do I book an appointment?
items.a: Call us or walk in during clinic hours.
We work with major insurers — bring your card on visit.

contact.address: Ground Floor, Medical Plaza, Your City
